posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Learn how to turn chaotic request management into a streamlined, transparent process using monday service.
You’ll discover how to centralize requests, automate repetitive tasks, and build an experience that gives both requesters and service teams clarity at every step.

November 16 | 16:00 CET

Learn how to turn chaotic request management into a streamlined, transparent process using monday service.
You’ll discover how to centralize requests, automate repetitive tasks, and build an experience that gives both requesters and service teams clarity at every step.

November 16 | 16:00 CET
